◎简　　介  

　　Double Dhamaal (English: Double Fun), originally titled Dhamaal 2 is an upcoming Indian comedy film directed by Indra Kumar, and a sequel to the 2007 film Dhamaal.The film is set to release on 24 June 2011, and shot in the Mehboob Studio, Mauritius and Hong Kong. At the 'Mahurat' of the film, it was announced that the four jokers, Riteish Deshmukh, Arshad Warsi, Aashish Chaudh...
